hee69395cg0020g42f7g9282gd6232dbc93d9: I think we both know what this 'weapon' they're after really is.
hfde3ca68g1c79g4480gb922g267b31e0ae4d: If they find out we have the artefact, they won't stop hunting us.
h5dd255d0g9dbfg4b9eg8a65ge9871d6557cc: I have absolutely no intention of revealing anything to this lot.
hc80a1a05ga333g4f69g836agc0213f95168c: I know, you're smarter than that. But be extra-careful, all the same.
heaecfdb3gacd3g477bgac22g308018176e6c: This makes things more complicated for us. We'll need to talk this through properly later.

h05104674ge69ag4b68g8f45gfc8e4f723d2d: There must be more you can tell me about this thing.
